news.headline: Treehouse Foods (NYSE: THS) missed Q4 EPS at 95 cents, below street view of 97 cents. Q4 revenue was $905.70 million, missing est. of 907.716 million. Stock rose despite the miss. CEO remains positive about company's future.
news.summary: Treehouse Foods, Inc. (NYSE:THS) saw an increase in its stock value on Friday following its fourth-quarter financial report. The company posted adjusted earnings per share of 95 cents for the quarter, slightly below the anticipated 97 cents. Quarterly revenues stood at $905.70 million, experiencing a 0.6% decline compared to the previous year and falling short of the expected $907.716 million according to analysts. Steve Oakland, the Chairman, CEO, and President, noted the company's improved net sales trends, gross profit margin, and Adjusted EBITDA margin in line with their revised projections despite challenges faced in 2024. The firm managed to make progress in supply chain initiatives despite dealing with a slower macro environment and two significant supply chain disruptions.

Greenwave Technology Solutions, Inc. featured in S&P Global Commodity Insights. Revenue guidance up to $47-50M for FY 2025.
news.summary: Chesapeake-based Greenwave announced that they have increased their revenue guidance for fiscal year 2025 to a range of $47 million to $50 million. Some of their key customers include industry giants Nucor, Sims Metal Management, Cleveland-Cliffs, and Georgia-Pacific. In the upcoming fiscal year, Greenwave plans to prioritize the recovery of rare earth metals as a crucial focus area. This announcement was made on February 14, 2025.

news.headline: Check out Zelenskiy discussing Ukraine's NATO bid in a recent interview.
Airbnb stock jumps on 12% sales growth, strong demand from all regions easing concerns.
news.summary: Airbnb reported a 12% increase in sales growth, attributing it to strong demand across all regions. This surge in sales has led to a jump in Airbnb's stock, easing concerns among investors.

news.headline: Stock market rallies towards highs, shrugs off inflation reports, and new Trump tariffs. AppLovin and Shopify were earnings winners.
news.summary: The stock market is approaching record highs despite concerns over inflation and the implementation of new tariffs by the Trump administration. Notable companies such as AppLovin and Shopify have reported positive earnings, contributing to the market's upward momentum. This recent surge is highlighted in the weekly review by Investor's Business Daily, showcasing the resilience of companies like AppLovin, Robinhood, Upstart, and Shopify in the current market climate. Investors are keeping a close eye on these developments as the market continues to rally, with hopes of sustained growth.

news.headline: BitFuFu plans 1GW Capacity Expansion to boost crypto mining amid market volatility under Trump influence.
news.summary: Global investors are worried about the tariff war and President Trump's impact on market volatility. Non-farm payroll data and consumer sentiment surveys have clouded the outlook for Federal Reserve interest rate cuts. Trump's tariff plans will be closely watched in the coming week. Bitcoin saw significant growth during Trump's first term due to institutional interest, media attention, and legislative changes. The crypto market may remain volatile in the short term. BitFuFu is preparing for a potential growth cycle in cryptocurrencies with its 1GW Global Capacity Expansion Plan. Established mining companies like MARA Holdings Inc., CleanSpark Inc., and Riot Platforms Inc. are implementing various strategies in response to market trends.

The report addresses key challenges like conflicting goals, ambiguous performance measures, and insufficient...

news.headline: Stocks rise with Dow up, S&P near record high; GameStop jumps on Bitcoin plans amid weak January retail sales.
news.summary: In today's stock market, small cap stocks surged ahead early on as retail sales data for January fell short of expectations. The Dow Jones saw a rise, while the S&P approached its all-time high. Additionally, GameStop experienced an increase in value following the announcement of their intentions to utilize Bitcoin.

news.headline: FuboTV (NYSE: FUBO) to reveal Q4 & full year 2024 financials on Feb 28, 2025. Co-founders hosting conference call.
news.summary: FuboTV Inc., known as Fubo on NYSE under FUBO, a top sports-focused live TV streaming service, shared that they will reveal the financial results for Q4 and full year 2024 on February 28, 2025. The announcement will take place before the market opens. CEO David Gandler and CFO John Janedis will conduct a conference call post-release to discuss the outcomes, alongside offering a concise business overview and future prospects. The conference call is scheduled for Friday, February 28, 2025.

news.headline: Compression therapy market projected to hit $5.6B by 2030 due to tech advancements and rising chronic health conditions.
news.summary: A report titled "Compression Therapy Market - Technologies and Applications" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com’s offerings. The global Compression Therapy market is witnessing significant growth, with projections indicating it will reach a value of $5.6 billion by 2030. This growth is driven by factors like the rising elderly population and a growing prevalence of chronic health issues such as venous diseases, lymphedema, and deep vein thrombosis. The market is evolving rapidly due to these key factors.

news.headline: 6sense released State of the BDR 2025 Report, surveying 262 BDRs, showing AI's positive impact on sales development.
news.summary: In San Francisco, 6sense®, an innovative platform transforming B2B revenue generation, unveiled its annual State of the BDR 2025 Research Report. This report, based on a survey of 262 BDRs mainly in North America's technology industry, sheds light on the changing landscape of the BDR role. Despite initial fears about AI displacing sales positions, findings indicate that BDR teams are growing and excelling with AI incorporation. The research illustrates that AI currently enhances the performance of BDR teams, showcasing a positive trend in the sector.

news.headline: Markets may improve with 'good Trump'; Bitcoin could hit $102,500 as risk sentiment shifts. BTC up 1.7%, ETH rose 3%.
news.summary: Geoffrey Kendrick, head of digital assets research at Standard Chartered, believes that markets are transitioning from negative to positive sentiments regarding President Trump. Factors contributing to this shift include lower oil prices, the possibility of a Russia-Ukraine peace deal, and a decrease in Trump-related tariff risks. Kendrick's research note suggests that Bitcoin (BTC) could see an increase, targeting a near-term price of 102,500. On Friday morning, Bitcoin was up 1.7%, while Ethereum (ETH) had gained 3% over the past 24 hours. Solana (SOL) was also performing well. For more details, refer to the full story on Benzinga.com.

BBYO receives $2.5 million from Sara Miller McCune for The Miller Institute for Democracy to promote civic engagement.
news.summary: The establishment of The Miller Institute for Democracy marks a significant step forward in BBYO's dedication to fostering leadership skills. On February 14, 2025, BBYO revealed a generous $2.5 million donation from Sara Miller McCune, a trailblazer in the publishing industry and the 15th International N'siah of B'nai B'rith Girls.

news.headline: NAVER D2SF invests in AI-powered e-commerce start-up "STUDIO LAB," creating product pages in 15-30 secs. Expanding to NA and Japan.
news.summary: Utilizing a multimodal AI system, a company can swiftly generate top-notch product detail pages for e-commerce within a mere 15 to 30 seconds. This innovative technology combines text, images, and layouts seamlessly. The company has successfully formed strong partnerships with more than 30 fashion brands and platforms, enabling it to venture into the North American and Japanese markets. The initiative has been supported by NAVER D2SF, with a focus on active engagement and growth.

news.headline: 1.5 million students nationwide participate in National No One Eats Alone® Day supported by Health Net & Centene Foundation.
news.summary: Over 1.5 million students across the country are set to take part in the upcoming event. Health Net, a well-established Medi-Cal managed care health plan in California and a part of Centene Corporation (NYSE: CNC), has announced its support for the event.

news.headline: FarmHouse Fresh® marks 20 years of skincare with 5 new products, surprises, and animal rescue, launched in Texas.
news.summary: In celebration of two decades of providing skincare solutions while supporting animal welfare, FarmHouse Fresh® from McKinney, Texas, revealed the launch of five new products. The brand, known for its farm-to-table spa treatments and house-grown ingredients, commemorates this milestone with surprises throughout the year. Since its establishment, FarmHouse Fresh® has remained dedicated to rescuing complexions and aiding animals in need.

news.headline: Discovery of new brain receptor GluN1-2B-2D by Prof. Hiro Furukawa and postdoc Hyunook Kang. Ketamine: from club drug to antidepressant.
news.summary: In a recent study, Professor Hiro Furukawa and postdoctoral researcher Hyunook Kang from Cold Spring Harbor Laboratory have confirmed the presence of a previously unidentified brain receptor called GluN1-2B-2D. The discovery was announced in Cold Spring Harbor, N.Y., on February 14, 2025. This breakthrough in neuroscience sheds light on the complexities of brain function. Notably, their work has revealed new insights into how this receptor operates in the brain, which has significant implications for understanding brain activity. The research could potentially revolutionize our understanding of brain receptors and their role in neurological processes.

news.headline: Babyganics® recalls Totally Tropical SPF 50+ Mineral Sunscreen rollerball and spray due to quality issues.
news.summary: In Racine, Wisconsin, on February 14, 2025, Babyganics® announced a voluntary recall of certain batches of its Totally Tropical scented mineral sunscreen products. The recall includes the rollerball and continuous spray formulas. Consumers who have bought these products are advised to...

news.headline: Meta plans major investment into AI-powered humanoid robots.
Elon Musk advocates for more efficient government at Dubai summit, promotes smaller institutions. (Character count: 88)
news.summary: In Dubai, United Arab Emirates, Elon Musk participated in a live discussion at the World Governments Summit wearing a T-shirt that read "Tech Support." He joined H.E. Omar Sultan Al Olama, the UAE Minister of State for Artificial Intelligence, Digital Economy, and Remote Work Applications, to discuss enhancing government efficiency. Musk stressed the importance of simplifying processes and suggested the need for smaller, more transparent institutions. The discussion took place on the final day of the summit and focused on optimizing government operations for better performance.

news.headline: Education apps market set to grow by $6.08 billion from 2025 to 2029, driven by AI and government initiatives.
news.summary: In New York on February 14, 2025, it was reported that the influence of AI on market evolution is significant. Specifically, the education apps sector is forecasted to increase by USD 6.08 billion between 2025 and 2029. This growth is anticipated to maintain a steady pace, with a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 14.5% throughout the projection period.

news.headline: Try the odd lots pub quiz featured in Odd Lots Newsletter today! Challenge yourself and test your knowledge.
RFK confirmed as HHS secretary, Trump appoints Cole as DEA chief, Fogel freed in Russia. Uncertainty looms in cannabis.
news.summary: The past week in the cannabis industry saw significant developments, including Robert F. Kennedy Jr.'s confirmation as the new Secretary of Health and Human Services, with a tight Senate vote of 52-48. Kennedy's prior support for marijuana legalization raised optimism, though his pledge to "follow the science on the harms of marijuana" has caused concern among advocates. President Trump appointed Terrance Cole, a staunch opponent of cannabis, as the new head of the DEA, potentially impacting future legalization efforts. Trump's intervention led to the release of Marc Fogel from a Russian prison due to medical marijuana possession. These political and policy shifts have stirred both hope and uncertainty within the industry, with key players expressing mixed views on the future of cannabis in America and beyond.

news.summary: A recent survey conducted by an organization revealed that 75% of the population in the study showed concerns about the increasing pollution levels in their area. The survey, which sampled 1000 individuals, highlighted that 80% of respondents believe that immediate action is necessary to address this issue. Additionally, the study found that 60% of those surveyed were willing to participate in initiatives aimed at reducing pollution in their community. The survey results indicate a strong urgency for authorities to implement effective measures to combat pollution and engage citizens in environmental conservation efforts.

news.headline: GRC platform market to grow by $44.22B from 2025-2029, with a 14.2% CAGR, driven by AI impact on market trends.
news.summary: In a recent report on the influence of artificial intelligence on market dynamics, it was revealed that the governance risk and compliance (GRC) platform market is projected to witness a substantial growth of USD 44.22 billion between 2025 and 2029. This growth trajectory indicates a steady advancement at a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 14.2% throughout the forecast period.

news.headline: Invitation for RaySearch's 2024 Year-end report presentation on Feb 21, 2025, at 10 am CET, following 07:45 am publication.
news.summary: On February 21, 2025, at 10.00 am CET, stakeholders including analysts, investors, and the media are welcome to attend the unveiling of RaySearch's Year-end report for 2024. This report, set to launch at 07.45 am on the same day, will provide insights into the company's financial performance and strategic outlook. Interested parties can access the report along with additional information during the presentation.

news.headline: AI market projected to grow by USD 237.4 billion from 2024 to 2028, driven by fraud prevention and attack mitigation.
news.summary: In a recent report detailing the influence of artificial intelligence (AI) on market trends, it has been projected that the AI market is poised to expand significantly by USD 237.4 billion between 2024 and 2028. This expansion is expected to take place at a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 30.07% throughout the forecast period, showcasing a positive growth trajectory for AI technology in the coming years.

news.headline: GameStop considers investing in Bitcoin, causing stock to rise 8.6%, but economist Peter Schiff criticizes move as 'Hail Mary' with 'no viable business plan'.
news.summary: GameStop (NYSE:GME) experienced a surge in stock price following reports of potential investment in Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC). Economist Peter Schiff views this move as a desperate attempt to maintain relevance, criticizing GameStop's lack of a viable business model. Despite GameStop's historical profitability challenges, its shares rose by 8.6% in pre-market trading on Friday in response to rumors of exploring cryptocurrency investments. According to CNBC, GameStop is currently assessing the alignment of such investments with its business strategy, with a final decision pending.

news.headline: XRP price up 12.47% to $2.73 in 24 hours, gained 8.0% in a week. All-time high at $3.40. Positive trend continues.
news.summary: In the last 24 hours, the price of XRP (CRYPTO: XRP) surged by 12.47% to reach $2.73, showing a positive trend for the week with an 8.0% increase from $2.52. Currently, XRP's all-time high stands at $3.40. The chart illustrates the price fluctuations and volatility of XRP over the recent period. Find more details on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Trader Unipcs predicts a potential comeback for meme coins like Dogecoin, citing a 70-90% correction already. Believes SEC approval for a Dogecoin ETF could trigger a massive move.
news.summary: A well-known trader named Unipcs has put forth the notion that meme coins may be gearing up for a significant resurgence, despite the general market sentiment. According to the trader's analysis shared on X last Friday, the risk/reward ratio seems to favor long positions, as several major meme coins have already undergone corrections ranging between 70-90% from their recent peaks. To support this claim, they mentioned possible catalysts such as the SEC's potential acknowledgment of a Dogecoin ETF filing, which could potentially trigger a substantial uptick in DOGE and generate positive momentum for other meme coins. Furthermore, the approval of Ethereum staking ETFs might signal a wider positive trend in the market. For further details, readers can access the full article on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Events industry market to grow by USD 1.07 trillion (2025-2029) at a 13.5% CAGR, led by rising corporate events and AI impact.
news.summary: In New York on February 14, 2025, an analysis conducted by Technavio predicts substantial growth in the events industry market. The market is projected to increase by USD 1.07 trillion between 2025 and 2029, representing a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 13.5% throughout the forecast period. This growth is attributed to advancements in artificial intelligence, driving market evolution and expansion in the events industry.

news.headline: Borregaard ASA: Person in charge made transactions involving the company's shares.
Director purchases 500 shares, increasing total holding to 10,000. PDMR acquires 250 shares, now holding 5,000 in total.
ITW Board declares $1.50 quarterly dividend ($6.00 annual basis) for 2025; payable on April 10, 2025.
news.summary: A dividend of $1.50 per share for the first quarter of 2025 has been declared by the Board of Directors of Illinois Tool Works Inc. (NYSE: ITW). On an annual basis, this amounts to $6.00 per share. Shareholders as of March 31, 2025, will receive the dividend on April 10, 2025, as announced from Glenview, Illinois, on February 14, 2025.

Binance CEO urges CEXs to list like DEXs amid concerns of price manipulation as token launches rise, straining liquidity.
news.summary: The CEO criticized the exchange for its listing procedures, claiming that the current method facilitates price manipulation. With a rise in token launches, liquidity is under growing pressure.
